scripts.build: npm run build:hs && npm run build:ts
scripts.test: npm run test:hs && npm run test:ts
scripts.clean: npm run clean:hs && npm run clean:ts
scripts.fmt:hs: find haskell -name '*.hs' -not -path '*/.stack-work/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -r stack exec --package ormolu -- ormolu --mode inplace
scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait db && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors magenta,green "pnpm --filter @katari-lang/api-server dev" "pnpm --filter @katari-lang/admin-web dev"
